subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! Muhammad hath hastened unto the sanctified court of Thy holiness and the precincts of Thy mercy, that he may attain unto Thy presence and behold [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی ان محمدا سرع الی ساحه قدسک و رحاب رحمانیتک حتی یدرک لقائک و ینظر
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @spiritual transformation, @primordial Covenant; the day of alast
